title: Adding support of passing empty strings
body:
Adding support of passing empty strings in second level of dictionaries(environment variables, labels). 
This is needed for example during openstack deployment that uses empty passwords for monitor users inside databases and also for passing labels.

Signed-off-by: Ivan Halomi <i.halomi@partner.samsung.com>

comments.body: Can you squash your commits and then we can merge.
